programme.title: E9 - Mold Money, Mold Problems
programme.desc: The three-story home is so packed, the front door won't open. Matt hunts for a serviceman's foreign currency collection. Extensive repairs drive up costs.

programme.title: E14 - The Defectors
programme.desc: Tony's crew defects to Parker's, leaving him to rely on less experienced operators. Parker's new hires create animosity as the team opens a new cut.

programme.title: E6 - BMW E30 The Reluctant Revival
programme.desc: Duncan talks Ant into buying a 1991 BMW 30 325i, convinced there's profit to be made. Meanwhile, Ant races to finish the hallway of the farmhouse.

programme.title: Jaws Vs Mega Croc
programme.desc: Using data from new experiments, experts construct a CGI fight to the death between two apex predators: the great white shark and Nile crocodile.

programme.title: E10 - Treasure Hunting Reinvented
programme.desc: At a hoard Matt's been circling for years, a genius inventor's pinball and jukebox collection could bring big sales -- but only if it's intact.

programme.title: E15 - Trommel Around And Find Out
programme.desc: Tony blows up at Mike to get the trommel running. Two of Rick's crew face off while trying to dig out Valhalla. Kevin leans on Buzz to get more gold.

programme.title: E3 - Into the Fire
programme.desc: Bask in the largest intact savannah on the planet, where mammals and insects fly through the air with the greatest of ease. Study traditional wildfire-management methods, explore a sandstone refuge, and watch a sugar glider try to escape the flames.

programme.title: E5 - Einstein Rules
programme.desc: Come full circle as the dry season descends and the Waterfront Pride enjoys good hunting and renewed confidence in their territory. Then celebrate the success of former outsider Einstein, who gets down to business as the king of his very own pride.

programme.title: E5 - A Turtle's Legacy
programme.desc: The sea turtle is one of the oldest animals on earth. These ancient mariners even pre-date the dinosaurs. They have existed, relatively unchanged, for over 100 million years. But now, all seven of the surviving species are endangered.

programme.title: E1 - Ghosts of Cederberg
programme.desc: A rocky landscape, carved over eons by wind, water and fire, these are the Cederberg Mountains of South Africa. These imposing peaks are home to an incredible diversity of plants and animals. But there are some here that remain unseen, lurking in the shadows and ready to strike at any time...

programme.title: E1 - Lyca the Painted Wolf
programme.desc: In central Namibia, a pack of painted wolves roams the arid land. Amid threats from lions and drought, a plucky little pup called Lyca has to grow up fast, learn the skills of a hunter, and find her place as member of the pack.

programme.desc: Rediscovering China is a half-hour documentary program on CGTN. Each edition offers unique insight into various aspects of life in China today. With unrivalled access to the country's people and places, the program aims to show the global audience an inclusive and vigorous China.

programme.title: Born In Bethlehem - A Clinic Full Of Hope - Part 2
programme.desc: These are the stories of women giving birth at the hospital in Bethlehem. The Holy Family Hospital is a place of hope, in a region marked by conflict, violence and insecurity.

programme.title: Operation Barbarossa - War Of Annihilation - Part 1: Summer
programme.desc: On 22 June 1941, the German Wehrmacht launched a war of aggression against the Soviet Union. Under the code name ‘Operation Barbarossa', the campaign aimed to bring the vast country in the east to its knees. Millions of people died as a result.

programme.title: Why Oil Won't Get Cheaper. The US-Iran Deal And The Price Of Everything
programme.desc: The dust is settling after a new US-Iran deal - but one question still matters: when will oil prices feel normal again? Since the war began in late February, markets have been on a rollercoaster. And even with an agreement in place, the damage isn't just political-it's physical.

programme.title: E206 - The Birth / The Revelation
programme.desc: Young Francois witnesses the birth of Barbapapa. // Barbapapa is a prisoner in a zoo.

programme.title: E8 - Operation Torch
programme.desc: In Operation Torch, the first joint U.S.-British offensive of the war, thousands of inexperienced U.S. troops face off against the hardened German Afrika Korps and the infamous Field Marshall Erwin Rommel.

programme.title: E8 - Mystifying Cursed Objects
programme.desc: Ancient cultures around the world have aroused fascination and provoked fear with curses and objects used to conjure them, like tablets and stones. But is there proof that some might have actually worked?

programme.title: E613 - Darting And Dodging
programme.desc: Rick and Corey check out a 1968 convertible. Will the negotiations be speedy, or will the duo dodge a bad deal? Chum wants a piece of an Oreodont fossil. But can he get a dino-mite price?

programme.title: E3 - Butterfly Knife In Your Stomach?
programme.desc: The Batangas region of the Philippines is famous for its butterfly-knife makers and wielders. Jaime learns a few tricks as she passes through but when she comes under unexpected attack, will they work?

programme.title: E132
programme.desc: An interactive programme that's as fun as it is informative and reactive to the meteorological events of the moment. Reports from the regions and special subjects in the studio offer an easy way to better understand the impact weather has on health, nature, history and everyday life.

programme.title: E81 - Sens (1)
programme.desc: Flavie Flament visits Sens, meeting local residents at the market. Today, she focuses on the city's history and museum.

programme.title: E3 - Jodoigne And Its Most Beautiful Villages
programme.desc: The network of Wallonia's most beautiful villages is celebrating its 30th anniversary! The programme is set in Jodoigne, where Saint-Remy-Geest and Melin have been awarded the label.

programme.title: E24 - Lalique Museum/Olivier Polge/Pharrell Williams/Aurore Mazeres
programme.desc: In Wingen-sur-Moder, the Musee Lalique presents the abundant work of Rene Lalique and his successors. Olivier Polge is the perfumer for Chanel. For Vuitton, Pharrell Williams breaks down the boundaries between music, fashion and art. Aurore Mazeres carries on the skills of five generations of upholsterers who preceded her.

programme.title: E15 - The Ramparts De Carcassonne With Franck Putelat
programme.desc: In the heart of Cathar country, we meet Franck Putelat, a Michelin-star chef, Meilleur Ouvrier de France and Bocuse d'Argent winner. programme.title: E1 - Special: Fashion Shows
programme.desc: The best of Spring-Summer 2026 haute couture with Dior, Schiaparelli, Chanel, and Alexis Mabille, who imagines a runway show enhanced by artificial intelligence. Between events, a discovery of the capital's best addresses, from prestigious palace hotels to must-see party venues. Also featured: the Men's Haute Couture Autumn-Winter 2026-2027 collection.

programme.title: L'info du jour[Live]
programme.desc: Un éclairage sur un événement marquant de l'actualité du jour, sélectionné pour sa portée et ses implications. Décrypté avec du recul, il permet de comprendre les enjeux sous-jacents, les conséquences possibles et les dynamiques qui façonnent le monde d'aujourd'hui.

programme.title: Culture prime
programme.desc: Des vidéos culturelles réunies sous un même label et une identité visuelle cohérente, portées par une ligne éditoriale commune : raconter l'actualité à travers le prisme de la culture.

programme.title: Le club Paris direct[Live]
programme.desc: Des experts issus de la géopolitique, des sciences de l'environnement, des sciences sociales et de la culture se réunissent pour analyser et débattre des sujets majeurs qui dominent l'actualité. Leurs échanges offrent des clés de compréhension sur les enjeux contemporains et leurs impacts.

programme.title: L'actu 360 : le journal[Live]
programme.desc: Un tour complet de l'actualité du jour, qui présente les faits essentiels en France et dans le monde. Grâce à des analyses claires et des clés de compréhension, ce programme permet de mieux saisir les enjeux politiques, économiques et sociaux qui marquent le monde contemporain et d'en suivre les évolutions principales.

programme.desc: Les informations qui font la une aux quatre coins du monde sont décryptées à travers des reportages, des analyses approfondies et le travail de correspondants internationaux. Un regard global et complet sur l'actualité pour mieux comprendre les événements qui façonnent notre époque.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Présentation d'un reportage tourné par les correspondants de France 24 sur un sujet qui fait l'actualité dans leur pays, suivi du décryptage par l'invité.

programme.title: E16 - The Rollercoaster Badge
programme.desc: The Squirrels build the best rollercoaster anyone ever saw. From a sweet song, to spinning through a helix, and getting the full G-force, it's a ride Duggee's going to remember!

programme.title: E36 - Backpackers
programme.desc: Mum and Dad are going on an adventure wearing the kids as their cheeky backpacks! Seeing the sights and buying street food, backpacking is a blast - until they lose their passports.

programme.title: E39 - Bad Mood
programme.desc: Bingo is playing Bad Mood with Dad, standing on his feet as Dad stomps around the house, controlling everything Bingo does and causing chaos.

programme.title: E8 - Curry Quest
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: E11 - Cats
programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.title: E9 - The Tree Badge
programme.desc: Duggee helps the Squirrels learn about all the things trees do for creatures around them.

programme.desc: The Go Jetters get caught up in Spain's Tomatina Festival. The Tomato Battle takes place every August in the town of Bunol, near to Valencia.

programme.desc: When notorious Diesel hides from the other engines, his plans backfire and he gets a surprise on Sodor.

programme.desc: After their snacks go missing, Sergeant Sarah & Constable Quack are on the trail of a biscuit burglar.

E46 - In The Garden/A Magic Day Out/Ball Pool/Pizza Bean/The Photograph
programme.desc: Mr Bean needs a new spade but why buy one when you can win one!

programme.title: E109 - Terrible Toddler Toys
programme.desc: Giant sinkholes appear out of nowhere and the Spies are sent on the case. As they investigate they discover the culprits are toddlers and their terrible toys! Meanwhile Alex has taken on way too much covering for Glitterstar at the café.

programme.title: E19 - Car Wars/Wedding Day
programme.desc: Mr Bean finally has a showdown with the mysterious Reliant Robin. Who will be the victor?

programme.title: E125 - All Wet/Prey Or Play/The Bentathlon/Forever Road/Adventures in Babysitting
programme.desc: No one believes Ben when he insists that one of the other patrons, waiting in line at the World of Wet Water Park, is the nefarious Frightwig disguised as a common girl so Ben must prove his case while protecting park-goers from her master plan: to destroy the park with its own water pressure!

programme.title: E264 - Mock 10/Can I Keep It?/Chicken Nuggets Of Wisdom/All Koiled Up/Summer Breakers
programme.desc: Ben, Kevin and La Grange find themselves stuck 'outside of time' after the latter hijacks a supersonic train with a faulty engine, forcing the trio to team up and slow down.

programme.desc: A magazine about the people of the sea. An invitation to set sail for a programme rich in voyages, discoveries and fascinating encounters with those for whom the sea is their life, the ocean-lovers and the high-seas adventurers.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 大學時期的男主角月岡夏，與同學南雲水季交往起來，並過著幸福的日子。然而，正當他們都在忙著就業活動的時候，水季卻突然向他提出分手，從此兩人分道揚鑣。就這樣過了七年，已經開展新生活的夏，卻突然收到大學時代朋友的通知，原來水季已經離開了人世。從分手那天起就沒有再見過水季的夏，帶著難以置信的心情去參加了水季的葬禮。在葬禮上，夏見到了一個名叫海的小女孩，並得知她是水季和他的女兒，讓他感到十分震驚。原來當年水季竟瞞著他生下了他們的孩子，並且一直默默地撫養著這個孩子。知道這一切以後，夏開始思考水季和海在這七年間的生活。

programme.title: E10
programme.desc: 故事取材自 1984 年的真實經歷，當時三谷寫了一部喜劇小品劇本，準備在澀谷一家脫衣舞劇院的脫衣舞表演間隙表演，以分散來檢查的警察的注意力。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 無論過去、現在、未來，每個別具意義的相遇都造就華麗的日子，且無論什麼人都曾經擁有過華麗的日子。事業、愛情兩得意的能力者李志赫遇上責任感強陽光開朗的咖啡廳經理兼室內設計師池恩悟。兩人儘管外表看似光鮮亮麗，但在經歷人生的低潮後仍守在對方身邊，克服各種試驗，找到人生的真諦。

programme.title: E9
programme.desc: 有著「洪吉童」封號的女義賊洪恩祖（南志鉉 飾）專偷貪官的財富，為百姓謀取福祉，怎料在她受到道月大君李烈（文相敏 飾）追捕時，兩人竟然意外互換靈魂！在互換靈魂的期間，兩人拋開成見重新認識彼此，一起攜手守護百姓，最終收穫珍貴的愛情。

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 故事講述女主角韓苡茱撞見自己的老公鄭世赫與繼妹韓宥拉出軌後車禍身亡，再次醒來後竟回到四個月前準備試婚紗的時候。得知老公劈腿真相的她決定復仇，於是找上本來要與繼妹相親的徐道國展開聯姻，準備一場手撕綠茶繼妹的報仇計畫。

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: 一部以專門經營鬼客人的的士為題材的電視劇。以實現鬼神們最後願望的的士司機為中心，敘述多種多樣的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: Instead of sticking to a single concept, these homes are decorated according to the owner's personal tastes. We'll showcase homes where you can see the ultimate expression of personal style.

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: MasterChef welcomes esteemed author and Yotam Ottolenghi protege Ixta Belfrage for a debut visit that packs a punch. The British chef has brought a Mystery Box bursting with her favourite produce.

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: Today's pressure test raises the bar, as the contestants are tasked with recreating guest chef Blayne Bertoncello's highly technical dessert, not just once, but in five consistent dishes.

programme.title: E13 - Khua Kling
programme.desc: It's make-your-own-takeout night and Rachael teaches us how to create her version of Khua Kling, a Thai stir-fry dish with ground beef, lime leaf and red curry paste, served with short-grain rice.

programme.title: E7 - Pool House Clusterflip
programme.desc: James and his team take on a massive seven-bedroom zombie home with a terrible layout and a huge, rotting pool house in the backyard. Partner Andy has brought the project to James, hoping for a big payday.

programme.title: E4 - Lamb Meatballs With Herby Couscous & Cardamom Snickerdoodles
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: E4 - Lamb Meatballs With Herby Couscous & Cardamom Snickerdoodles
programme.desc: Jake makes his sweet and savoury lamb meatballs with pearled couscous. It's a recipe so versatile you can use nearly any ingredient you have on hand. It isn't a one-pan dish, but it might as well be!

programme.title: E20
programme.desc: Twelve MasterChef contestants are met by a bust of judge Jean-Christophe Novelli, made entirely of butter. Fighting for their place in the competition, they must create a dish celebrating butter.

programme.title: E21
programme.desc: It's Viral Week and contestants must cook a dish worthy of a Nonna's table, under the watchful eyes of viral sensations Sooshi Mango. The four best dishes will win a shot at immunity.

programme.title: E8
programme.desc: Today, we'll explore a house where, if the perfect wooden furniture isn't available, the couple takes matters into their own hands, creating their own pieces, making it feel like a cozy cafe.

E26
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

programme.title: E2
programme.desc: 亞洲天后孫燕姿首次亮相內地跨年，香港“古惑仔”五兄弟陳小春、鄭伊健、謝天華、林曉峰、錢嘉樂全員重聚，韓國歌王Theone鄭淳元和韓劇新一代“男神”池昌旭重磅加盟，還有亞洲女子天團SHE合體獻唱，內地實力唱將沙寶亮和R&B小王子胡彥斌等海內外明星共同迎接新年到來。

programme.title: E54
programme.desc: 突破傳統的交友方式，24位單身女生以亮燈和滅燈方式來決定男嘉賓去留，通過「愛之初體驗」、「愛之再判斷」、「愛之終決選」、「男生權利」等決定男女嘉賓的速配成功。

programme.title: E11 - 曠野來信 走心對談
programme.desc: 30+的素人嘉賓們帶著成熟與期待，在摩登都市上海入住郊區小屋，從陌生到熟悉，從心動到堅定，共同開啟一段30天的尋愛之旅；除了元老嘉賓謝楠、張純燁、唐藝昕之外，更邀請了徐藝洋和顏安等組成「半熟觀察員」，一同見證高甜瞬間。

programme.title: E26
programme.desc: 千金小姐林夏不幸被贅婿葉冬設局陷害，不僅失明、父親亦遭毒手。她在重見光明後，看穿了丈夫覬覦家產的邪惡真面目；為了奪回一切並揭開真相，林夏決定改頭換面，以全新身份潛入舊日世界，向渣男與同夥展開一步步毫不留情的復仇。

Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.title: The Great Nature 'The Birth Of The Atlantic Ocean'

programme.title: When East Goes West
programme.desc: Fei is the master cook in Hong Kong, while his son Suckling has established himself as a real estate salesman in Canada. Suckling sends for his father to join him in this new chapter of their lives. Happily, Fei hops on a plane to Canada. During the flight, he has the good fortune of meeting Yim Chau, a young woman traveling to join her aunt in Canada. Subsequently, Fei meets Yim Chau's aunt and Suckling meets Yim Chau. Suckling loves Yim Chau but is too shy to express his feelings. When Yim Chau announces she falls in love with Richard, Suckling feels heartbroken but still helps her with dating preparations. However, when he discovers Richard cheating her, Suckling fights him. At the same time, he is being chased by the bank for debts...

programme.title: Heart Of Dragon
programme.desc: It's the two brothers of Hong Kong action as you have never seen them before in a gripping drama where the lines blur between family loyalty and upholding the law. Jackie Chan plays Ted, a SWAT officer with thwarted dreams of being a sailor because he has to look after his mentally disabled brother Danny. The resentment boils over in a terse showdown between the two brothers. When Danny accidentally ends up with a robbery loot while playing a harmless game of cops and robbers with his friends, Ted has to make an agonizing decision. Does he save the hapless Danny? Or arrest him?

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Sandra Ng
programme.desc: Known as the 'Queen of Comedy', Sandra Ng as an actress has spanned across generations, allowing her to witness the ups and downs of Hong Kong films over decades. Looking back onto the golden age of Hong Kong cinema, Ng confessed that comedies in the old days were much more simple and straight forward. Stepping into the millennium, recession in film industry somehow inspired her to produce own masterpieces of the era. With her youth dedicated to the Hong Kong cinema, how does she feel about lifelong career as an actress, a director and a producer?

programme.title: All's Well End's Well (Extended ver)
programme.desc: All's Well, Ends Well is a comic romance of 3 hapless brothers, who eventually learn through their amorous exploits and misadventures that love is only won through gradual nurturing, and quickly lost through the quick, dishonest, selfish ways which they have always taken for granted.

programme.title: When East Goes West
programme.desc: Fei is the master cook in Hong Kong, while his son Suckling has established himself as a real estate salesman in Canada. Suckling sends for his father to join him in this new chapter of their lives. Happily, Fei hops on a plane to Canada. During the flight, he has the good fortune of meeting Yim Chau, a young woman traveling to join her aunt in Canada. Subsequently, Fei meets Yim Chau's aunt and Suckling meets Yim Chau. Suckling loves Yim Chau but is too shy to express his feelings. When Yim Chau announces she falls in love with Richard, Suckling feels heartbroken but still helps her with dating preparations. However, when he discovers Richard cheating her, Suckling fights him. At the same time, he is being chased by the bank for debts...

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Fully Funny - Eric Kot
programme.desc: Eric Kot's hilarious image has been widely recognized by Hong Kong audience on big-screen, particularly after portrayed the character of a zany assistant in ‘Tricky Business' and an attentive killer in ‘You Shoot, I Shoot'. Having years of acting experience, he has formed his own view of how to film a comedy. Apart from being in front of cameras, he had been invited by acclaimed filmmaker Wong Kar-wai to participate his work at directorial role and encountered Asian star Takeshi Kaneshiro behind-the-scene. In this episode, Eric is going to tell his stories you might not know about.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Sandra Ng
programme.desc: Known as the 'Queen of Comedy', Sandra Ng as an actress has spanned across generations, allowing her to witness the ups and downs of Hong Kong films over decades. Looking back onto the golden age of Hong Kong cinema, Ng confessed that comedies in the old days were much more simple and straight forward. Stepping into the millennium, recession in film industry somehow inspired her to produce own masterpieces of the era. With her youth dedicated to the Hong Kong cinema, how does she feel about lifelong career as an actress, a director and a producer?

programme.title: Tour Down Under '26 E1 -Stage 1 Willunga to Wilunga
Under the Light
programme.desc: Su Jianming, the son of Deputy Mayor Zheng Gang of Jinjiang City, defies his father's counsel and attends a cunning dinner invitation from the wealthiest man in Jinjiang City, Li Zhitian. To his astonishment, he becomes an unwilling witness to a shocking incident where someone is coerced into thrusting their hand into a simmering hotpot. As past mysteries resurface, hidden factions from various quarters plot and scheme, employing intricate strategies, scrutiny, and suspicion. Amidst the web of conflicting desires, the pressing question remains: who will ultimately unveil the final mask?

programme.title: Lady Cop & Papa Crook
programme.desc: Senior Inspector Molline Szeto is assigned to investigate the kidnap of a boy, whose father is the kingpin of illegal red oil in Greater China, John Fok.

programme.title: Over My Dead Body
programme.desc: A dead body and a hotchpotch of homeowners in a residential building on a single night: all hell breaks loose. As the Jewish axiom has it, “man thinks; God laughs.” On a night like any other, Ming, together with his wife and mother-in-law, finds an anonymous naked dead body lying at their doorstep. They might not know who the body was, but they have no doubt that their unit will become a “murder home” once this is exposed. Its property value will nosedive, and they will be transformed from blissful homeowners to miserable victims. So they decide to pass the buck to their neighbours. There are eleven living residents in four units on the same floor. Besides Ming's family of five, there are the retired elderly couple, Mr. & Mrs. Chan; the single lady Mary and her maid; and the Cheung's, an irascible father and his cantankerous son. Last but not least, there is this mysterious woman from an upper floor who chain smokes. This motley group of residents start fighting against one a

programme.title: The Exchange
programme.desc: Dojo and May are a loving couple. Because Dojo has a brain tumor and needs 1 million baht for the operation, they decide to rob a money exchange store. Unluckily, the couple with 10 unfortunate patrons of the money exchange center are held hostages by 3 professional robbers on the same day. It is a robbery inside another robbery as well as some secrets among these people will be revealed. What could possibly happen when these people are trapped in the store with no way to escape?

programme.title: E1172

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E56
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: E29
programme.desc: 《超時空羅曼史》講述了民國功夫巨星向秦羽，因一場意外來到21世紀，與十八線編劇金阿銀相遇，兩人展開了奇妙浪漫又充滿戲劇性的愛情故事。

programme.title: E18
programme.desc: 故事講述了周筱風（趙又廷 飾）、方筱然（毛曉彤 飾）和林逸（金世佳 飾）三位心臟科醫生機緣巧合下，在東立醫院心臟中心相遇。三人因專業背景、職業理念不同而產生摩擦碰撞，隨後在治病救人的過程中逐漸磨合達成默契，最終在生命戰場並肩作戰的故事。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

programme.title: E14
programme.desc: 朱韻剛開始大學生活，就被“壞小子”李峋的闖入徹底顛覆了世界。被朱韻當成不學無術富家子的他，真實身份竟是學校破格錄取的特招生，難得一見的編程天才。兩人在幾次交鋒後，對彼此都有些賞識。學長方志靖對朱韻多次刁難，李峋出手維護朱韻，還邀她加入了自己組建的備賽隊伍，代表學校贏得了重大編程比賽。在相處中，兩人情感日益升溫

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 年輕狀元郎陸江來上任淳寧縣令後屢破奇案，卻因捲入一樁殺妻舊案，從官場新星淪落至絕境。瀕死之際，幸得茶王之女榮善寶搭救。兩人聯手整頓家族、開拓茶道，在茶園裡締結了一段愛情佳話。

E1 - Coral Sea Dreaming
programme.desc:
Coral Sea Dreaming enters into the very heart of life - and death - on a coral reef. The film follows a story that spans 500 million years and stars some of the most exotic and wondrous marine creatures on earth. Coral is the planets greatest natural architect, and coral reefs boast the highest biodiversity of any ecosystem.
We meet thousands of reef inhabitants, from ancient turtles to feeding sharks, adorable pygmy seahorses and savage sea slugs, witness a manta ray ballet and courting octopus. Specialized state-of-the-art High Definition technology captures these lives with unprecedented intimacy, illustrating elaborate courtship displays, mating rituals, feeding frenzies, intense nighttime predation, cannibalism and chemical warfare.
Filmed over 2000 dives on coral reef ecosystems; The Great Barrier Reef, Ningaloo Reef, Papua New Guinea and at the Coral Sea; Coral Sea Dreaming is a celebration of reefs now under threat of ocean acidification and climate change. There is much t

programme.title: E10 - Hard Truths of Conservation
programme.desc: When Dick Cabela founded “Cabela’s” in 1961, he was unaware it would become the foremost outfitting store in the world. So it’s only fitting that his son is on a quest to explore the Hard Truths of conservation. Join Dan Cabela, on this high-impact journey of discovery, as he uncovers some lesser-known facts about conservation. In particular, the role which hunting and the utilization of wildlife can play as a modern-day conservation tool.

programme.title: E8 - Hyrox
programme.desc: The hottest new sport of hybrid games sweeping the world is Hyrox, so the team puts their fitness to the test in Melbourne.

E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E1 - Squirrel Trouble & Other Wacky Problems!
programme.desc: Arpo is dealing with squirrel trouble & other wacky problems! That pesky squirrel is always trying to steal food or run off with Baby Daniel's teddy bear. But the wacky problems don't stop there! When a ghost crashes playtime, Arpo has to use all his tech to bust it. Then, Arpo's own systems go haywire, like when a toy's music makes him dance uncontrollably & when Baby Daniel accidentally terrorizes him with a magnet. It's a day of very wacky problems!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E1 - Messy Mayhem in the Clubhouse!
programme.desc: Get ready for some messy mayhem in the clubhouse! The chaos begins when a slime volcano erupts, & the friends have to jump on pillows to avoid the gooey mess. Then, Boba finds a magical mirror that creates a colorful clone of him every time he looks! Can he hide all the new Bobas before JJ finds out? The messy fun continues as the friends chase a fly during breakfast & Wally tries to sneak a bite of frosting while baking alphabet cupcakes.

programme.title: E5 - JJ Learns to Share, Help & Be Kind!
programme.desc: JJ is learning all about how to share, help & be kind! First, he learns the magic words 'please' & 'thank you,' & what to do when you make a mistake. The lessons continue as JJ, YoYo & TomTom show how much fun it is to share their snacks & toys. Being kind also means being helpful, & JJ's family loves to help each other around the house. From using good manners at the table to learning how to wait in line, it's a day of learning to be a good friend & family member!

programme.title: E3 - The Garage Football Championship
programme.desc: Join Gecko for the garage football championship! When Weasel starts cheating, Gecko must fix the damaged players and use smart strategy to win the game. Help Gecko show everyone that playing fair is the only way to be a true champion!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes

From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E1 - The Ultimate Teamwork & Rescue Special!
programme.desc: Get ready for the ultimate teamwork & rescue special with Kii & Yii! The adventure begins when Princess Cat is flying her plane but gets in a sticky jammy mess, causing her to lose control! It's up to Kii & Yii to get her down safely. Then, the friends are playing near Princess Cat's castle when she accidentally falls down the well & needs to be rescued again! From helping Humpty Dumpty to rounding up runaway vegetables, Kii & Yii always save the day!

programme.title: E2 - When Everything Goes Hilariously Wrong!
programme.desc: Get ready to laugh as everything goes hilariously wrong for Kii & Yii & their friends! The chaos starts when Robot creates a jelly-making machine, but it goes haywire & he ends up stuck inside a giant wobbly jelly! Then, Princess Cat puts way too much soap in her washing machine, causing it to overflow & fill her entire castle with bubbles! From a wobbly tooth to a picky eater, it's one funny problem after another!

Music Bank
programme.desc: The best tunes in Korea! the most sensational music show on TV satisfies all your senses! Fantastic performances and Awe-inspiring harmony by the nation's top musicians! Follow the latest trend in the Korean music scene through the K-chart, a summary of the week's hottest songs.

programme.title: Stars' Top Recipe At Fun-Staurant
programme.desc: Gourmet celebrities team up to explore the world of convenience stores and share their secret recipes!

programme.title: Jang Youngsil: The Greatest Scientist Of Joseon
programme.desc: The drama is the first 'historic science' drama that has been produced in Korea. This drama depicts the successful life story of the scientist Jang Youngsil that contributed to the development and accomplishment of Joseon's science during the 15th century. In particular, the drama emphasizes his accomplishment through showing the restrictions and difficulties he experienced due to his social class as a slave. Moreover, the drama aims to depict Jang Youngsil as the role model of 'Korea's youth of the 21st century' through displaying his scientific accomplishments. The drama also expects to stimulate scientific curiosity amongst audiences and help them easily understand the fundamental principles of science by utilizing various data and scientific videos.

programme.title: Cabbage Your Life
programme.desc: The thoroughly city-bred Seong Taehun family suddenly finds themselves in the pristine yet unpredictable village of Yeonri-ri. Determined to return to Seoul, they face hilarious challenges, cultural clashes, and heartwarming moments. This family “reboot” drama captures their misadventures, resilience, and the unexpected bonds they form along the way.

programme.title: The Alibi[Live]
programme.desc: Vincent, an heir to a news empire, gets accused of killing his rival, Walter. To protect his reputation, he hires Stella, an escort with her own haunted past, to pose as his alibi. What begins as a transactional arrangement soon becomes dangerously real as their shared wounds and ambitions draw them together. But when they uncover the truth, the two are compelled to confront their true feelings.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88[Live]
programme.desc: Two estranged families reunite at the reopening of Hotel 88, until the former bestfriends behind it are found dead. Forced to share the inheritance, their children uncover buried secrets and the truth behind their father's mysterious deaths.
